name: iter_0016_c02_gru_champion_3seed
reasoning_summary: iter_0016 c02. The plain-gru multi_stream champion config (r_00000089 hidden=40, gru, late_concat, focal=1.0) at epochs 150, n_seeds=3. We NEVER measured the plain champion at n_seeds=3 -- only structural mutations of it. This is the missing trustworthy baseline.
